programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is taking his show on the road through sunny California!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen depart Juneau, Alaska aboard the Wilderness Explorer in search of the endless natural beauty of Glacier Bay. Among their encounters: are bears, humpback whales, and glaciers. Jack also explores an old gold mine.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Guayaquil, Jack and his daughter Kathaleen visit a park in the mangroves that preserves Ecuador's rural culture, as well as many of the country's endangered animals, including harpy eagle, tapir, tigerill and ocelot.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wild Guides
programme.desc: Join Jack on a Wild Countdown safari to South Africa, Peru, Kenya, Borneo, and Namibia with Jack’s favorite guides leading the way to see cheetahs, lions, rhinos, pink dolphins, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets creatures armed with superb scales, like Nile Crocodiles, Galapagos Tortoises, Thorny Devils, an African Rock Python, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: What could be better than getting up-close animal encounters with wildlife from Africa, Asia, and North America? Doing it all in one place, right here in the ole' US of A!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he braves the waters of Botswana's Okavango Delta! The world's largest inland delta provides a beautiful home to thriving wildlife like Crocs, Hippos, and Elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: You're Endangered, Baby
programme.desc: What does it take to save a species from extinction? Patience, education and lots of babies! Today, Jungle Jack is counting down six endangered species surviving against all odds -- one baby at a time.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In southern Brazil, Jack and Kathaleen boat up a raging river to Iguassu Falls, the world's largest. At the base of the falls, dad and daughter marvel at the unusual nesting site for thousands of Swifts.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with delicious and nutritious adventures. From carnivores like jackals, lions, and sharks to our vegetarian friends, the elephants, Jungle Jack is gearing up for a Feeding Frenzy!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack to the Future
programme.desc: Today, it’s a two-for-one special, as Jack travels to each location TWICE! Cheetahs, rhinos, manatees, kangaroos and more! Join Jack for time-traveling tour through natural history.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen as they immerse themselves with Phinda's rangers who are protecting the reserve's precious population of rhinos and lions!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of life on the Hanna's farm. Then he and Sue meet a couple that have dedicated their lives to providing a home for disabled dogs, cats, and horses. Jack heads to the eastern front of the Rocky Mountains for an old-fashioned cattle drive!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack trades his safari suit for a wet suit as he dives in with bottle-nosed dolphins! Jack and Sue, get more than they bargained for as they go along for the ride with dolphins on their daily outing into the open ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rebounding
programme.desc: Meet six amazing animals rallying from the brink of extinction. Bald eagles, American alligators, Florida manatees, Peregrine falcons and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his family as they immerse themselves into the elephant population at Zimbabwe's Hwange National Park. The Hanna's hide-out underground in a unique bunker at one of Hwange's watering holes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack takes his grandson on an epic Serengeti safari. They witness Cheetahs and Lions on the savannah, Wildebeest, and Zebra starting their annual migration, and visit a local Maasai school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack gets a special behind-the-scenes look at a retirement home for chimpanzees where caregivers have rescued over 250 chimps that now live in large family groups on specially designed islands in Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen travel to northern Canada for encounters with Beluga whales and Polar bears. At Churchill, the Hannas find Hudson Bay much to their liking, but nothing tops the small town's hottest summer pastime.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he reveals how to tell the difference between some commonly confused creatures, like Cheetahs and Leopards, Crocs and Gators, Penguins and Puffins, Turtles and Tortoises and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Adaptations
programme.desc: From the Arctic to the desert, animals have found a way to survive and thrive in every eco-system on the planet. Join Jack as he’s counting down ten amazing animal adaptations.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes behind the scenes of the International Anti-Poaching Foundation to see how they are bringing paramilitary techniques to the front lines of conservation in a fight to protect Africa's rhinos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Stinkiest Stinkers
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he sniffs out the smelliest animals on the planet! Sloths, Tasmanian devils, sperm whales, binturongs, hyenas, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: My Better Half
programme.desc: Jack’s wife Suzi – she’s a loving mother, a passionate conservationist, and a fearless adventurer. Come along for encounters with dolphins, elephants, cheetahs and poison dart frogs, just to name a few.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Today the mammals are taking over the Earth, sky, sea and even the Wild Countdown studio! Join Jungle Jack as he counts down some special mammal species that have adapted to thrive in unique ways, like orcas, camels, marsupials, platypus and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From extremely endangered whooping cranes and powerful grizzly bears, to adorable red pandas and African hippos, this place has it all! Jack's crew even gets an extra special behind-the-scenes experience at the gorilla habitat.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Australia
programme.desc: G’day mates, this countdown is heading Down Under to meet up with Australia’s rare and wonderful creatures! From dingoes and devils, to kangaroos and cassowaries, come along for an Australian odyssey as Jungle Jack counts them down to number one!

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Jamie and Alesha Dixon cook a double marinated spicy prawn dish; salmon with a twist.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the new target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly couple moves to North Fork under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a vicious killer. The plan backfires when the son shows up at their home.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Trouble arises when unexpected visitors arrive at the Hilltop and the community is thrust into action; heartbreaking discoveries are made.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A Heaps prisoner makes a discovery; Carol searches for someone in the nearby forest; Rick and Morgan find themselves in the company of strangers.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With the threat of the Saviors still looming, Aaron continues searching for allies; Daryl and Rosita take action and confront an old friend.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities join forces in the last stand against the Saviors as all-out war unfolds.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl Dixon's arrival to France sets off a violent chain of events that inadvertently puts a young boy at the heart of a growing religious movement in danger; Daryl agrees to help shepherd the boy to safety in exchange for help returning to America.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl, Isabelle, Laurent and Sylvie face trouble on the road; Isabelle remembers the day the hungry ones appeared; Laurent struggles to fit in.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: The group arrives in Paris, where Isabelle confronts her past while growing closer to Daryl; Codron seeks help from the leader of a growing nationalist movement called Pouvoir, putting the Union of Hope and Laurent under dangerous scrutiny.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl and Isabelle must negotiate with Quinn, the proprietor of the underground Demimonde club, the last vestige of art and expression in Paris.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl faces old demons, recalling the circumstances that landed him in France; Isabelle's sacrifice forces her to consider drastic measures; Genet commences a celebration for the people of Paris.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Genet solidifies her base of power; Daryl has a job to do before he can return to America.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Carol Peletier and Daryl Dixon confront old demons in their fight to reunite with each other halfway around the world and protect the people they love.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and his group make a risky run into Washington, D.C. to search for artifacts they will need to build the civilization he and Carl envisioned.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities join forces to restore a bridge that will facilitate communication and trade; someone is gravely injured at the construction site.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick's vision for the future is threatened by a mysterious disappearance that divides the work camp where the communities are building a bridge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Advertencia (S6 Ep7)
programme.desc: Las cosas en Alexandria están tranquilas, brevemente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: De principio a fin (S6 Ep8)
programme.desc: Varios problemas se encuentran entre si.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Sin salida (S6 Ep9)
programme.desc: Con "caminantes" dentro de Alexandria, Rick y el grupo están asustados, en desventaja y las cosas solo se ponen más difíciles.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: El mundo por venir (S6 Ep10)
programme.desc: Una misión de recolección sencilla se vuelve complicada cuando el grupo entiende que no son los únicos que quieren un enorme depósito de materiales.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Nudos para desatar (S6 Ep11)
programme.desc: Cuando Rick se da cuenta de que Alexandria no es tan segura como pensaba, se deben tomar decisiones sobre un nuevo rumbo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Aún no es mañana (S6 Ep12)
programme.desc: Rick y en grupo entienden que la única manera de mantener la paz en Alexandria es luchar contra el enemigo nuevo. Pero esta vez el grupo puede estar en desventaja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: El mismo bote (S6 Ep13)
programme.desc: Carol y Maggie deben luchar por sus vidas después de ser capturadas por Los Salvadores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: El doble de lejos (S6 Ep14)
programme.desc: Dos grupos diferentes salen de Alexandria en busca de provisiones. Mientras ambos están ocupados con el futuro de la comunidad, un peligro inminente los desviará.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Este (S6 Ep15)
programme.desc: Alexandria entra en alarma cuando se dan cuenta de que alguien ha desaparecido. Varios grupos de búsqueda salen a rastrear, pero lo que encuentran no es lo que esperaban.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: El último día en la Tierra (S6 Ep16)
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo deben dejar atrás las paredes para salvar a uno de los suyos. Lo que viven en el camino cambiará sus vidas por siempre.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick busca a su familia luego de despertar de un coma en un mundo aterrorizado por los muertos vivientes. Morgan y Duane, a quienes conoció en el camino, ayudan a Rick enseñándole las nuevas reglas para la supervivencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, sin quererlo, hace que un grupo de sobrevivientes quede atrapado por los muertos vivientes. Por otra parte, la dinámica grupal va de las acusaciones a la violencia cuando Rick se enfrenta a un enemigo mucho más peligroso que los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick toma la decisión de regresar a Atlanta para recuperar un bolso lleno de armas y salvar la vida de un hombre. Mientras tanto, Lori y Shane deberán lidiar con el sorprendente regreso de alguien a quien creían muerto.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Landscape contractor Roger Cook installs granite steps and general contractor Tom Silva installs the flooring on the first floor. Host Kevin O'Connor takes homeowner Amy to test drive new appliances.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The Favats takes Kevin O'Connor to see a local farm. Tom Silva puts down composite decking. Commissioner Brian Donahue explains how the town is working towards sustainably harvesting trees.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Woodworker Kevin Bittenbender shows host Kevin O'Connor how they build window trim kits in the Bensonwood shop and general contractor Tom Silva shows Norm the new industrial steel staircase.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: In Weston, plumbing and heating expert Richard Trethewey shows Kevin O’Connor the house’s new cooling system. General contractor Tom Silva installs a handcrafted copper owl weathervane.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The project draws to a close and everyone puts their own prospective finishing touches on the house. Builder Tedd Benson joins the crew to celebrate a job well done both in the shop and on site.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor and Norm Abram take This Old House on the road to New York City to restore a 1904 Brooklyn brownstone. The owners will convert it into a home while preserving and restoring period detail.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin visits Prospect Park. Norm checks framing and hears thoughts on kitchen layout. Richard considers updating and/or upgrading the old steam heating system. Roger visits a garden center.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Richard visit NY Harbor. Norm explores how to restore the house’s wood finishes. Designer Carole Freehauf shows period-appropriate tile combinations. Richard gets an update on plumbing.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin inspects the new exterior paint job. White oak flooring with decorative cherry accents is laid down. Plaster crown moldings are replicated. A new retaining wall and brick patio is going down.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm checks progress in the owner's unit. Richard shows the showerhead combination. Carole shows Kevin paint color schemes. Norm sees progress on the kitchen’s woodworking. A new fence is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin finds vintage spiral stairs and the new plaster medallion being installed. Kevin lays down click-together linoleum floor tiles while ductwork over cabinetry is concealed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm learns a faux painting technique to disguise old woodwork. Finished countertops arrive for the kitchen and are installed. A mud bed for garden tile and a mosaic bathroom floor are laid down.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Interior door trim in the new library. Marble from Italy and manmade quartz are installed. New electrical service is set up for the three-family house. Unconventional method for grouting floor tile.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Restored white oak entry doors are reinstalled, connections to the appliances and sink are finished. Norm sees the new temporary wall in the master bedroom. Kevin gets a lesson in furniture shopping.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: After final installations and a look at the whole transformation, the crew gathers on the front stoop to celebrate the completion of the project and to congratulate Michael Streaman on a job well done.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 30th anniversary season of This Old House opens with an addition to a Dutch Colonial Revival. The architect presents his plan, while Tom Silva and Norm Abram arrive to begin the demolition.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm Abram and Tom Silva remove the vinyl siding from the house’s exterior. Kevin O’Connor travels to Raleigh, North Carolina. Roger Cook breaks up the old porch slab.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowners decide to stay in the house during construction. Richard Trethewey gets to work in the basement. Tom extends the old windowsills. Kevin O’Connor gets bad news from the electrician.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor and Tom Silva reinforce and level the kitchen ceiling. Kevin visits Long Island, New York, to learn about the Dutch Colonial Revival style. Norm Abram frames the first-floor platform.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva builds the gable-end wall. The master electrician sets up temporary power. Richard Trethewey shows Kevin the new lines to the old radiators. Tom walks Kevin through the roof framing.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva and Kevin O'Connor reframe the kitchen walls. Tom installs a large new window in the library. Homeowner Gillian Pierce envisions her new kitchen. Kevin visits a former TOH architect.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook helps prune hemlock trees. The master electrician installs a bath fan. Kevin O'Connor revisits a green building project. Tom Silva shows Kevin how he's roofing the new addition.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva replicates exterior trim using cellular PVC. Norm Abram installs an exterior door. Architect Paul Rovinelli takes Kevin O'Connor on a tour. Tom gets help in removing bookshelves and a wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva fabricates a decorative bracket. Richard Trethewey heats the new kitchen space. Interior designer Lisey Good demonstrates smart storage solutions. Norm Abram patches the exterior siding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva builds a stairway to the basement. Richard Trethewey shows how to select a faucet. Tom works on a vaulted ceiling. An insulation contractor installs spray foam insulation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva and Norm Abram install copper gutters. The plastering contractor puts up a coat of plaster. Kevin O’Connor learns about a new paint product. Tom removes the old garage.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor helps Tom Silva build a new deck. Roger Cook lays concrete pavers for the patio. A tile specialist shows Kevin options for the kitchen. Norm Abram learns about the new oak flooring.

programme.desc: Jack snows a stunning skier named Inga into believing he's a downhill champion.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: One morning, a girl asks Captain Ryu if he would hire her as a housemaid. Ryu politely declines the offer, and the girl leaves while uttering strange words. The girl is Celestial Maiden Aprasa and is being exploited by the Yapool...

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: The Yapool agent Space Mask infiltrates TAC HQ. While pursuing the agent, Mikawa gets severely wounded. A sculptor named Sakai helps her out, and eventually, the two become close, but Sakai is sculpting terrible monster models for kindergarteners...

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: A peculiar elderly man is seen brainwashing children by performing a strange song-dance. This is all part of a plan devised by the Yapool to bring children to an alternate dimension and end humanity. Hokuto jumps into the alternate dimension on his own.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Yoshiko starts behaving erratically ever since she was soaked by red rainfall. Yoshiko leaves her bed and speaks to Terrible-Monster Mazarews as if it was her own son. This was part of the plan devised by the remnants of the Yapool, the Mazaronians.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: A pyramid suddenly appears in the middle of an elementary school playground. One by one, the children drop to the ground after inhaling the red gas that jets out from the pyramid. A girl named Michiru is the only one left standing.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Alien Hipporit claims to be the strongest being in the universe and asks Earthlings to hand over Ace. Ace battles with the foe that not even TAC can handle, and is transformed into a bronze statue mid-battle. The Ultra Brothers come to the rescue, and...

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Alien Hipporit defeats the 5 Ultra Brothers and orders to surrender Earth, but Captain Ryu is not allowing it. TAC goes for an all-out attack, but still, Alien Hipporit is indestructible. Just when all hope is lost, Father of Ultra appears!

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Yuko, who has been acting erratically ever since the last full moon, shows an extreme interest in defeating Terrible-Monster Lunaticks. Hokuto is puzzled by her behavior, but this terrible monster is the main culprit in turning the moon into a death star.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Terrible-Monster Gitagitanga destroys the Keihin Industrial Zone, but no one sees the terrible monster. While on an investigation, Hokuto meets a lonely boy named Dan Umezu. Dan claims he can see the Star of Ultra, but ends up being called a liar.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: A mysterious black cloud shrouds the Tokyo sky. TAC closes all the surrounding roads, but many casualties occur because of Hokuto's mistakes. Hokuto gets suspended. During this unfortunate timing, Terrible-Monster Red Jack comes to destroy the city!

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: The high-specification gunpowder "Spyner" developed by the Terrestrial Defense Force was attacked while being transported to the test site. The Ultra Guard was to carry the gunpowder by being part of the rally.

programme.title: Ultraseven

programme.desc: Rev and Justine decide that they are finally ready to move forward with adopting a baby. While Justine worries about the details of the adoption, Jojo applies to college and is determined to gain acceptance.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie navigates life as a single man following a public breakup with Joseline. Joc and Scrappy plan a boys' night out. Stevie's daughters organize a garage sale to help their dad get rid of the past and start anew. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Ray J is in town and Stevie and the boys are excited to show him a good time. Meanwhile, Stevie is surprised to find himself falling for an old friend. But she might not be as excited about starting a relationship as he is. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I. and Tiny decide to celebrate their union with a trip for two to Costa Rica. However, when the family catches wind of this planned getaway, T.I. and Tiny feel the pressure to make it a family vacation. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tiny's firstborn child, Niq Niq has decided she's ready to move out. Meanwhile, Messiah seeks permission from T.I. to obtain a Driver's permit, but T.I. has some of his own unorthodox tests for Messiah to pass first. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: A longtime friend of the family, Crow, seeks T.I.'s expert advice and guidance in obtaining some female companionship. Meanwhile, Tiny discovers Niq Niq hasn't been completely honest about where she is and what she's doing. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With a thousand dollars on the line, T.I. and K-Dub test Major's knowledge against the people of Atlanta. Tiny and Niq Niq are on a health kick and a recently single Precious is determined to join them in attempts to get herself a man. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I.'s friend K-Dub needs a place to stay, but after a few days, he overstays his welcome with the family. Meanwhile, King is inspired to set a world record and goes on a search to find one thing he can do that no one else can. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I. is excited about his role in the new Superhero movie Ant-Man. Unfortunately, King and Major aren't. A proactive Tiny hatches a plan to nix any baby fever Niq Niq might have.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Major wants to take acting to the next level but struggles to focus. T.I. notices his older children don't help one another, so he takes them to a place where they are locked in a room & the only one way out is to work together. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Niq Niq living on her own, Tip and Tameka make a surprise visit to her apartment. But when Tip notices articles of clothing belonging to a man, he suspects she's having her boyfriend sleepover, which is against their rules. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tiny wants to find Precious a new man, this time by online dating. Meanwhile, Tip and Major play sick for some peace and quiet. However, when convincing his other sons to wait on him, he risks them finding out and wanting revenge. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie, Tami, and Evelyn meet up with Jackie to find common ground. Brandi Maxiell returns to LA. After receiving exciting news about her IVF treatment, Evelyn decides to celebrate by inviting the ladies to Palm Springs. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: All the ladies head to Palm Springs for a celebratory weekend. Evelyn surprises Cristen with a makeover. Malaysia invites a friend from the past to dinner, which pushes Shaunie, Tami, and Evelyn over the edge. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Back in LA, Shaunie, Tami, and Evelyn regroup after being ambushed by Brandi in Palm Springs. Jackie hears some information about Cristen. Tami and Evelyn confront Cristen on whether or not she's been completely honest. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jackie throws her "love your body party". Malaysia feels snubbed by Shaunie, Tami, and Evelyn. Cristen divides her friendship with Jackie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Tami interviews possible surrogate mothers. Saniy'yah throws a garden party. Malaysia confronts Shaunie, Tami and Evelyn on some boiling issues. Jackie and BJ have words that pushes Jackie to her limits. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Malaysia spends time with her kids. Jackie finds out that Evelyn isn't happy with her. Things come to a head with Evelyn and Jackie at a party that Evelyn throws for her magazine cover photos. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Tami suggests the ladies embark on a trip to New York City. Evelyn takes Shaunie on a trip down memory lane in the Bronx. Jackie pushes Evelyn to her breaking point and all hell breaks loose at drinks. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: After the altercation with Jackie and Evelyn, the group is fractured. Tami hands over her "momager" roll when her daughter Jazz gets signed to a record label. An uninvited guest makes an appearance at Saniy'yah's party. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Tami has a comedy show and tells some off-color jokes about a few of the ladies. Jen Williams returns to the group. Evelyn and Jen talk for the first time in seven years. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Tami breaks some tough news to Reggie. Malaysia still feels divided from the group. Evelyn and Jackie see each other for the first time since New York at Shaunie's "Women's Empowerment" event. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie invites the ladies to Miami to take a trip down memory lane. Kijafa Vick and Jeniva Samuel invite the ladies on a gorgeous yacht. Jackie is stuck on a boat with Evelyn and confronts Shaunie about an interview she did about her. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn shows off her gorgeous revenge bod, Jen goes to court to seek a restraining order against her ex-boyfriend, and Malaysia introduces a new crew.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn grapples with a big decision regarding her frozen embryos, Tami wonders why Jen got so close to Evelyn, and a rumor spreads about Byron Scott's girlfriend Cece.

programme.title: Basketball Wives

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Top Tier has been dominating in the ring, but now they face the joint forces of Lil J-Boogie, Stephy Slays, and Ariel Sky who want to make them pay for their underhanded ways. In the Main Event, Tormenta faces former WOW Champion Penelope Pink.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster and a surprise partner, announced by Samantha Smart, take on the Fierce Sisters. Chantilly Chella and Holidead face off with Las Bandidas. In the Main Event, Lana Star challenges the culprits who ran up her hotel bill.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster attempts to put Santana Garrett into detention as they battle in the ring. Also in action is Reina Del Rey, Sandy Shore, Holidead, Genesis and Katarina Jinx. The action heats up and still, so many questions surround WOW.

programme.title: Origins of WOW
programme.desc: This documentary explores the hardscrabble journey of women wrestlers,from early 20th century carnival sideshows and the male dominated world of professional wrestling,to the ultimate creation of the only all-female wrestling league in the 21st century.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal what drove them into the ring. Sahara Spars opens up about a traumatic life-changing experience, Jessie Jones reveals her long journey to the top, and Leia Makoa makes her parents and her island proud.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal their surprising backstories. Miami Sweet Heat's physical therapy patients are the real superheroes, Princess Aussie's journey to the U.S. almost didn't happen, and Jennifer Florez represents a new generation of wrestlers.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal their path to the ring. Americana personifies the athleticism of WOW. She talks about her upbringing and how gymnastics are a part of her life.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal their path to the ring. Keta Rush goes from bullied to bully buster, Tiki Chamorro represents the true pride of her island of Guam, and Kandi Krush rises from crushed Olympic dreams to crushing her opponents.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard invades WOW - Women Of Wrestling demanding a Championship Title Match. Champion Santana Garrett lets Tessa know she better get in line.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: With her father physically assaulted by Tessa Blanchard, Santana Garrett vows that the Championship is now second to her personal issues with The Born Legend.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Beast demands her shot at the WOW World Championship. Current Champion Santana Garrett’s eyes remain locked on revenge against Tessa Blanchard. And Tessa provides an exclusive interview that explains her reasons for attacking Santana’s father.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Champion Santana Garrett wants revenge on Tessa Blanchard for what she did to her beloved father. Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard gets what she wants… a shot at the Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Psycho Sister Razor has her debut match against Faith The Lioness. Plus, following the unprecedented Triple Threat Match, the most prestigious prize in women’s wrestling, the WOW World Championship Title, is decided tonight!

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Norwegian Nightmare, Nikki Krampus makes her long-awaited debut. Beaten in a back alley, Keta Rush seeks revenge against her assailant The Dagger. But Keta soon finds that to succeed she will have to fight off the more than just The Dagger.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: A new Champion in WOW is coming to terms with the fact the bullseye of her competitors is now squarely focused on her. Havok, The Monster Of Madness emerges as a threat to the WOW roster.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Randall has a sheriff bed a prisoner, the man's gang kidnaps the sheriff and two others and threatens to kill one per day until the man is freed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh is hired to protect a sensible man and his pregnant wife from his father-in-law and the villagers who are angered when he refuses the town healing woman or \\"witch\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After Josh reluctantly takes the task of finding a man and his wife's pet ewe, he becomes the butt of many jokes in the community while cattlemen nearly hang him when he mentions sheep.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a convicted killer escapes prison, Josh is hired for $500 to protect the woman whose testimony put him there.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a town looking for a man who asked him to come there for a job that pays $500.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by Harry Weaver to track down his twin brother Pete, who's wanted with a $500 bounty on him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw - the local sheriff who is a friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly takes a job protecting a beautiful deaf, mute, teenage girl and keeping everyone off the father's place for a day or two.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh escorts an East Coast photographer to take a picture of his friend El Gato (The Cat), who is a famous, hilarious bandit living in the hills of Mexico with a small army.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A broke Josh is hired by a fearful man to help him elope with his sweetheart, Jane, the daughter of a local rancher.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh takes a job for $200 protecting an express office employee who stole $10,000 and wants to return it before it's discovered missing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A Japanese woman travels to the U.S. to find an American man who proposed to her in Japan and hires Josh to find him since no one will help her in her search.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in town thinking the sheriff summoned him to go after a man.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides to Barney Durant's horse business to rent a couple of horses right after Barney pushes his son David to leave.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: While pursuing Carl Martin, Josh stops at a marshal's office where Carl is being held.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes' daughter summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A ranch manager hires Randall to bring back a line rider charged with grand theft.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked into advancing half the bounty to a man who promises to lead him to the wanted criminal Shawnee Bill, but Bill may be closer than Randall thinks.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A banker with a consuming thirst for vengeance hires Randall to accompany him to track down the man he believes responsible for his son's death and a bank robbery.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is deputized to transport a ruthless killer to Tucson but exchanges him for the nun kidnapped by the killer's gang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall brings a suspected murderer to Pot Hole but fears the man won't receive a fair trial when he finds the townspeople in the grip of a power-mad bully.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Josh, as a favor to a friend, escorts a beautiful woman to a trial that could see her hang for killing her husband, her lover, and a foreman, she charms him to convince her of her innocenences.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is asked by Stacy Torrance for help when she finds a wanted poster under her door - for her for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Owing a favor to a sheriff, Josh agrees against better judgment to go to the lawless town of Bent Horn to bring back a man wanted for bank robbery and murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh sets out to help a heartbroken wife locate her missing husband, but his mission of mercy meets with a resistant and tight-lipped townspeople.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is bushwhacked by bounty hunters in cahoots with the local sheriff, who now must keep Josh from blowing the whistle on their illegal but lucrative \\"bounty game\\".

channel.display-name: Warner Bros. TV Say Yes to the Dress

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Jessica dresses three brides simultaneously; Maria brings three generations of her family to an appointment.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: A former miss DC has come to the store with only one gown in mind; Tamara is looking for an out-of-the box gown that makes a statement for her destination wedding; Stephanie comes in for her fitting but is not sure if she made the right choice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Nicole hopes to find the perfect wedding gown with the help of her psychic Aunt; Desiree brings along her 90-year old grandma; Allyson tries to match her family's 100-year old veil with her modern gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Randi is having a carnival wedding and wants a polka dot gown to match; Mary is an opera singer; Boo and Piper are having a dog wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Nicole leaves her six-month old quadruplets at home while she shops for a gown for her destination wedding; Margo, who lost all of her hair due to cancer treatments, comes to the salon to find a gown that makes her feel beautiful.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Confident Stephanie is searching for a gown she can dance in; Body conscious Kristyn has been avoiding wedding dress shopping; Sherri has lost thirty-five pounds but is still nervous about her body-hugging gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Shari looks for a dress for renewing vows with her high-maintenance hubby; Alex must find a gown in 24 hours before returning home to Canada; Ebony is nervous about a fitting after having lost 30 pounds.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: With no budget in mind, Kandice comes from Texas to find a blingy dress for her vow renewal ceremony; Barbara wants a sexy gown with sparkle that will match her pricey stilettos; Tykeshia comes back for her fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Violet wants a tight and sexy gown to wear at her Dominican Republic wedding; Rachel hopes Kleinfelds will be her last stop; Leighanns first dress did not meet her standards.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Amanda is looking for a dress with tons of embellishment; Tamara is looking for a gown to make a statement at her destination wedding; Stephanie comes into her fitting still not convinced that she's bought the right dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Kristin Chenoweth comes to Kleinfelds with her bride-to-be assistant; Amy and her twin sister have very different opinions; Heather tries to please her picky sister.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Saralyn needs two dresses in order to share her wedding with her sister Megan who has Down syndrome; Rachel brings her sister.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Emily wants to look sexy on her big day despite her mother's traditional requests; Aja searches for a dress to show off her curves; Courtney hopes her dress is filled out by her new chest.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Dana is shopping for an edgy dress; Akisha brings the best man to represent her husband; Alicia is looking for a dress to match her Texas style and insulin pump.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Tanya's outspoken family helps her find a blush-colored dress; Mary Beth shops with three generations of family members; Stella only brings her mother to her first fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Katie hopes to find the perfect mermaid-style dress; Kayla's father and sister disagree on what type of dress she should wear; Katie is worried that her dress may be too tight.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Mackenzie searches for a third dress; Kelly looks for a dress that is better than the one she has already found; Rachael wants to replace the gown she purchased, but no longer likes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Cheryl recently beat breast cancer and had her last reconstructive surgery; Jennifer battles a rare kidney disease; Kristin is overcoming stage four lung cancer.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Olympian Dawn is looking for a princess gown; Rita is searching for a 1940s style; Natalie needs a traditional gown for her full-size frame.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Kara fell in love with a red dress at another salon but her mother has different ideas; Sheena needs a colorful dress; Tamara tries on her dress for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Dina is looking for a dress as sassy as she is; Laura wants a simple lace dress; Shandel wants a fitted dress but her daughter disagrees.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Broadway dancer LaQuet looks for a fun gown; Valerie wants a mermaid silhouette until she tries one on.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Shari looks for a dress for renewing vows with her high-maintenance hubby; Alex must find a gown in 24 hours before returning home to Canada; Ebony is nervous about a fitting after having lost 30 pounds.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Emily wants a traditional gown; Brittany wants to show off her bright red hair and tattoos; Lauren is nervous about her dress being too unusual.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Brooke wants a one-of-a-kind gown; Amanda wants to add even more bling to her dress; the wrong lace is ordered for Taylor's jacket.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Cindy gets a surprise at the salon; Victoria has an unexpected family reunion at her appointment; Doni is looking for a unique surprise of her own.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Amanda is mourning the recent loss of her future mother-in-law during her shopping trip; Dana searches for a dress of which her late mother would approve; Katy wants to incorporate her late mother's wedding gown fabric into her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: A daddy's girl hopes her father's dress vision matches her own; Missy brings her opinionated brothers; a bride longs for her brother's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Comedian Seth Meyers surprises Shealynn, an injured army veteran; a southern model wants a sexy dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: A bride flies 4,000 miles from Alaska to find a dress; a Norwegian bride has exhausted all options in Europe.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: A blue dress for a destination wedding; a skeptical entourage; a unique dress to incorporate color; a shocking flower-patterned gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Lauren recently eloped and wants a sexy dress for her family reception; money is no object for Aleshia; custom-made gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: A petite bride looking for a gown for a 20's theme inspired wedding; a bride returns to her fitting to add a personal touch to her gown.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: Five expert pumpkin carvers face a spooky structures challenge; the carvers stack pumpkins to create undead animals in a pet cemetery-themed Quick Carve round before moving on to make enormous prehistoric creatures in the Big Carve round.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: The final four pumpkin carvers create terrifying monsters-in-law and larger-than-life monster party scenes using Atlantic Giant pumpkins; the winning carver will take home the $25,000 prize and bragging rights.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins
programme.desc: Four of America's best pumpkin carvers come together for a Halloween pumpkin carving competition; in three rounds of challenges, the artists use carving and sculpting tools to execute their intricate designs, vying for a $10,000 prize.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: In the first challenge, the bakers battle it out to create the best creepy cupcakes; the second challenge consists of classic costume desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The bakers spook the judges with their sculpted scary treats and then mash up flavors and themes to create devilishly delicious desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The remaining five bakers whip up creepy, dangerous donuts; in the main challenge, the bakers dig deep to create graveyard pumpkin desserts that are to die for.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The final four bakers bake it out in a haunted house cake battle.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Seven bakers must create creepy bite-sized monster treats; in the main heat, zombies attack as the bakers try to whip up a zombie dessert that makes the judges hungry for a bite.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Six remaining bakers must make a Halloween mummy dessert using pre-made pie dough; the bakers must create a candy-stuffed, wicked cake based on a Halloween icon.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Things get spookier when the five bakers left in the competition must head to the haunted circus to create a dozen scary clown cake pops; the bakers make frighteningly strange mash-up desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers create tomb-themed desserts; the bakers make a dessert inspired by the colorful artistry and spirit of Mexico's Dia de los Muertos, or Day of the Dead; the winners move on to the Halloween Baking Championship finale.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The final three bakers must fill a haunted tree with decorated Halloween cookies; the bakers have just six hours to construct a spooky ginger dead house; special guest Duff Goldman stops by; the baker with the most impressive house wins $25,000.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Eight bakers show off their decorating skills by creating Halloween candy-filled cookies; for the main heat, it's oozy fun with sublime slime desserts where bakers can make any treat, but it must be filled with a gooey slime.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Seven remaining bakers must make witches' fingers and toes and create a sauce to dip them in; the witch theme goes a step further in the main heat when the bakers must create desserts that look like witches, complete with edible brooms.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Bakers work in teams and put their minds together to create the most outrageous and delicious left brain/right brain desserts; in the main heat, the bakers face their fears by using common phobias like insects and ghosts as inspirations for desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Five remaining bakers take a light, sweet and utterly harmless dessert and head to the dark side; it's a main heat filled with frights as the bakers make scary mask desserts to spook the judges; one baker is eliminated at the end of the round.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Four remaining bakers attempt to make desserts that taste like their favorite candy bars; bakers face death by chocolate and must create a dessert that combines chocolate with odd ingredients; one baker is eliminated.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City finals, Kaiba's mystery opponent is Ishizu. With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel: she will defeat Kaiba with sacrifice's blast! How can Kaiba win when it's predestined that he will lose? Kaiba must change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik's evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the judicial jerk Big 3 Johnson who takes the Deck Master form of Judge Man! How can Joey defeat a foe who can destroy Joey's monsters at will?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Just when Joey seems to gain the upper hand, he hits the longest streak of bad luck in the history of mankind! Has Joey's fortunes finally run out, or is a crooked judge ignoring the rules of the law?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 4 Nezbitt challenges Duke, Tristan, and Serenity for the right to gain control of three bodies at once! Will Serenity's errors cost her team the ultimate price when Tristan and Duke can't cover for her mistakes?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: One down, two to go! With the loss of Tristan, Serenity is heartbroken. Can she pull herself together and remember the lessons Tristan taught her to turn the duel around?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan's back... but he's not who he appears to be when he kidnaps Mokuba! It's time for Kaiba to stop monkeying around and rescue his brother, but he's confronted by Big 5 Leichter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 5's Satellite Cannon attacks Kaiba's monsters from deep space! Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba inspires him to believe that his brother will pull out the victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba arrives at Noah's sanctuary to rescue Mokuba, but Mokuba wants to stay with Noah! Has Mokuba seen the evil within Kaiba, or is something more sinister in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five concentrate their attack on Joey so that Yugi would be forced to duel all alone! Outmanned and overpowered, Yugi and Joey are near the end of the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five summon an almighty dragon that previously defeated Joey, Mai, and Mokuba! Joey and Yugi pull out all the stops, but is that enough to avoid their minds being scattered over virtual reality?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel for control of KaibaCorp when Noah squares off against Kaiba! But can Kaiba fight at full strength after he learns the hidden truth about Noah... and the tragic past that made him what he is today?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark steals monsters into its keep to use as an impenetrable wall of servants! How can Kaiba hurt Noah when Noah has an endless stream of monsters to protect himself with?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
